text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we win the Radio Nikkei Sho, a haughty
little girl suddenly calls out to us.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
You there! Sakura Chiyono O, stop! You're a fan
of Maruzensky, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm Maruzensky's biggest fan! I've been her fan
since three months ago!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think this little girl could hurt Sakura
Chiyono O, but I keep my eye on the situation
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
You've got promise. Anyone who achieves the
same feats as Maruzensky is worthy of my
interest.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You watched me run in the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
I don't just mean that race! I also saw you in the
Tokyo Sports Hai Junior Stakes, and obviously
the Radio Nikkei Sho just now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So you watched all the races that Maruzen
won! And I just happened to place first in those
races too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It all makes sense now... You really love Maruzen
too, just like me! I have so much to talk about
with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the three of us somehow end up going
to a ramen restaurant together.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text: Slurp, slurp. ...And before I knew it, I was rooting for you as well. You ran pretty well in today's race, too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you so much! I felt really good about
today too, actually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I think I really grasped the secrets of the mile, just
like Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
Wow... so everything you do is related to
Maruzensky! Just like I thought, your passion is
nothing like other run-of-the-mill Maruzensky
fans!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you'll be making your grand exit
after competing in the sprint in Sapporo? That'll
be quite an ending to your career. Hehe, then you
can be my first fellow fan and—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... no, it's way too soon for me to stop
running. My main goal right now is the autumn
Tenno Sho. I have to race there if I want to
become Maruzen's rival.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text: Wait a second... Her rival? You're kidding. You want to go up against the Maruzensky?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Um, sorry if that wasn't clear...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I don't want to be her fan. I want to be her rival.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying? I thought you loved her and
looked up to her?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I do love her. And that's why I want
her to see me as a rival.
choice_data_list:
She's working hard every day to make sure that
happens.

She's working hard every day to make sure that
happens.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. As you know, Maruzen's racing abilities
are incredible. My skills are painfully mediocre
compared to hers.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But even if I can't hold a candle to her, I swore to
never give up. That's why I'm in the Twinkle Series
now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I'm going to race in the autumn
Tenno Sho, so I can show her how strong I am and
light a fire in her heart.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text: ...I see. I guess we can't be fellow fangirls, then.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
You might love Maruzensky in a different way than I do,
but I can tell you still love her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The ramen was really good! Um...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text: I don't mind accepting you as Maruzensky's rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
I said, I accept you as her rival! You're strong and
a hard worker!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Ribbon
text_block_list.text:
So go become her greatest rival! Use your love
for her to grow stronger, and make her feel that
love!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow...
choice_data_list: Looks like she's rooting for you too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I never thought one of Maruzen's fans
would acknowledge me as her rival...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you. It's such an honor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the girl turns and runs off, Sakura Chiyono O
gives her a deep bow of respect and gratitude.
